title: BuildCraft UNOFFICIAL
description: Unofficial port of BuildCraft 8.0.0 to newer Minecraft versions
body:
# An **Unofficial** port of [BuildCraft](https://mod-buildcraft.com/pages/download.html) 8.0.0 to Minecraft 1.21.1+ on NeoForge

…more of an attempted faithful recreation. Please mention if something is missing or broken!

### Some new features:

*   JEI & REI integration (REI support stops at 1.21.11 only right now)
*   Advanced facade de-duplication (literally cuts down on like +1000 identical facades)

### On the non-commital roadmap:
* Some new minor gameplay features
* Further mod support
